openFindings.title: tasks.md contradicts its own intent-classifier boundary
openFindings.description: T-03 says intent-classifier surfaces must stay untouched, but T-06 and T-V3 explicitly add and verify continuity lambda coverage there.

openFindings.title: plan.md and implementation-summary.md never reconcile the intent-classifier exception
openFindings.description: The execution plan still guards intent-classifier.ts and its tests as untouched blast-radius files, while the implementation summary documents a continuity lambda assertion there without amending the plan.

openFindings.title: description.json retained the pre-renumber parentChain
openFindings.description: The packet's current specFolder is under 001-search-and-routing-tuning, but parentChain still names 010-search-and-routing-tuning, leaving lineage metadata internally inconsistent.

openFindings.title: graph-metadata.json carries conflicting intent-classifier test paths
openFindings.description: key_files lists both tests/intent-classifier.vitest.ts and mcp_server/tests/intent-classifier.vitest.ts for the same logical test surface, creating ambiguous packet metadata.

openFindings.title: Packet verification points at the wrong runtime seam for continuity handoff
openFindings.description: The packet says to wire continuity through hybrid-search.ts, but the current runtime maps the resume profile to adaptiveFusionIntent in memory-search.ts before stage1 and stage3 consume it, so the verification seam in the plan is technically stale.

openFindings.title: graph-metadata entity extraction includes low-signal tokens
openFindings.description: Derived entities such as Scope Create, Approach This, and the lower metadata precision for downstream packet search and graph tooling.
